2606.11150.title: ABC-Bench: An Agentic Bio-Capabilities Benchmark for Biosecurity
2606.11150.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) are rapidly acquiring capabilities relevant to biological research, from literature synthesis to interpretation of experimental data. Increasingly, LLM agents can also perform in silico biology tasks that previously required experienced human biologists. These emerging AI capabilities offer new opportunities for scientific discovery and biomedical advances, but they also shift the landscape of biosecurity risks. To address this, we introduce the Agentic Bio-Capabilities Benchmark (ABC-Bench), a suite of tasks to measure agentic biosecurity-relevant capabilities. ABC-Bench evaluates LLM agents on both benign and dual-use biology tasks: writing code to operate liquid handling robots, designing DNA fragments for in vitro assembly, and evading DNA synthesis screening. These tasks require a combination of biology and software expertise. All tested LLM agents outperformed the median expert human baseliner on all three tasks. Agents performed highly on tasks drawing on published knowledge and well-documented protocols, and more weakly on a task requiring novel bioinformatics reasoning. In three wet-lab validation experiments, we found that OpenAI's o4-mini-high produced scripts that, when run on an OpenTrons liquid handling robot, successfully assembled DNA with expected sequences.
2606.11150.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）正在迅速獲得與生物研究相關的能力，從文獻綜述到實驗數據的解釋。越來越多的 LLM 代理也能執行以前需要經驗豐富的人類生物學家的計算生物學任務。這些新興的 AI 能力為科學發現和生物醫學進步提供了新的機會，但它們也改變了生物安全風險的格局。為了解決這個問題，我們介紹了代理生物能力基準（ABC-Bench），這是一套用於測量與生物安全相關的代理能力的任務。ABC-Bench 在良性和雙用途生物學任務上評估 LLM 代理：編寫操作液體處理機器人的代碼、設計用於體外組裝的 DNA 片段，以及躲避 DNA 合成篩查。這些任務需要生物學和軟件專業知識的結合。所有測試的 LLM 代理在這三項任務上均超過了中位數專家人類基準。代理在依賴已發表知識和良好記錄的協議的任務上表現優異，而在需要新穎生物信息學推理的任務上表現較弱。在三個濕實驗室驗證實驗中，我們發現 OpenAI 的 o4-mini-high 生成的腳本在 OpenTrons 液體處理機器人上運行時，成功組裝了具有預期序列的 DNA。
2606.11150.author: Andrew Bo Liu et.al.
2606.11150.authors: Andrew Bo Liu, Samira Nedungadi, Bryce Cai, Alex Kleinman, Harmon Bhasin, Seth Donoughe
